description: Detects erasure of trans epistemologies — ways of knowing, community survival strategies, and relational identities.
patterns: Research treating cis perspectives as default framework
Educational curricula excluding trans theorists and thinkers
Silencing trans-led methodologies in social science and humanities
examples: Curricula on gender theory omitting trans authors
Academic framing of trans communities as 'subjects' not 'knowledge producers'
consequence: Suppresses trans epistemic authority and continuity of intellectual traditions.

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
